title: Quickdraw Floral Wild Bloom Accessory Bag for Women – Ladies Multipurpose Stationery Makeup & Toiletry Zip Pouch Pencil Case – Ideal for Travel 21.5cm x 12.5cm
features: Stylish & Versatile Accessory Bag – This floral wild bloom pouch is perfect for storing stationery, makeup, ladies toiletries, and everyday essentials. A must-have for home, school, office, or travel
Premium Polyester Material – Made from 100% durable polyester, this accessory case is lightweight, flexible, and easy to clean, making it ideal for daily use
Secure Zip Closure – Designed with a smooth-running zip, ensuring your items stay safe and organized while on the go. The sturdy zipper makes accessing your essentials quick and hassle-free
Compact & Travel-Friendly – Measuring 21.5cm x 12.5cm, this slim pouch fits easily into handbags, backpacks, or suitcases, making it a great travel companion
Easy Maintenance & Long-Lasting – This floral accessory bag is wipe-clean only and dries naturally, keeping it fresh and looking new without requiring special care
description: A stylish way to keep your essentials organized—at home or on the move! Designed with ladies and girls in mind, this floral accessory bag is the perfect companion for travel, work, or daily use. Whether you're storing makeup, toiletries, stationery, or feminine essentials, this versatile pouch keeps everything neatly in place. Crafted from 100% durable polyester, it’s lightweight yet sturdy, with a wipe-clean surface for effortless maintenance. The secure zip closure ensures your items stay protected, while the compact 21.5cm x 12.5cm size makes it easy to slip into your handbag, backpack, or suitcase. Whether you're heading on a weekend getaway, a business trip, or just need an organized handbag, this multi-use floral bag is a must-have. The wild bloom design adds a touch of elegance, making it a perfect gift for birthdays, Mother’s Day, Christmas, or as a thoughtful treat for yourself. Practical, stylish, and made for ladies on the go—this accessory bag is the perfect blend of beauty and function!
